description: Wedge style sandals from catwalk to make sure you look stylish even as you weather the elements with this hardy footwear option. UpperTextured synthetic leather upper straps for the forefoot and midfootCurved and padded footbed with print and branding OutsoleWedge style heels with stitch detail Waffle patterned lugs on the outsoleSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
